query_title: Another Gay Sequel: Gays Gone Wild!

recommendations.title: Spring Breakdown
recommendations.overview: Three women in their thirties head to a popular Spring Break destination and try to relive the Spring Break they never had.

recommendations.title: Dirty Kids
recommendations.overview: French seniors enroll in summer camp.
Two university students gain insight into life and love as they get to know each other during a road trip across Europe.

recommendations.title: From Justin to Kelly
recommendations.overview: A waitress from Texas and a college student from Pennsylvania meet during spring break in Fort Lauderdale, Florida and come together through their shared love of singing.

recommendations.title: Don't Blame the Kid
recommendations.overview: After a one-night stand results in pregnancy, a young woman decides to become partners with the emotionally immature father-to-be.

recommendations.title: Populaire
recommendations.overview: An insurance agent and his new secretary become locked in the grip of romance and competition as they train together for a speed-typing contest.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Crocodile
recommendations.overview: Eight college students board a houseboat for spring break that promises to be the best of their young lives...how many will survive?

recommendations.title: Chhichhore
recommendations.overview: Following a group of friends from university as they progress into middle-age life and go their own separate ways.

recommendations.title: Boy Meets Girl
recommendations.overview: In Kentucky, a transgender woman and her best male friend lament the lack of eligible partners and step across old boundaries of love and romance.
